---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Subsystem

Which subsystem does this affect? (e.g., governance, discovery, vault, MCP server, dashboard, new subsystem)

## Desired Behavior

What should the system be able to do?

## Why It Matters

What problem does this solve? Who benefits and how?

## Additional Context

Any relevant examples, references, or design ideas.
